description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named GLideN64 that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow should have two jobs: Linux and Windows. The Linux job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, installs necessary packages, prepares the environment, and builds and uploads GLideN64 for various Linux configurations. The Windows job runs on windows-latest, checks out the repository, sets up MSBuild and MSYS2, prepares the environment, and builds and uploads GLideN64 for various Windows configurations.
